sub_mechanisms: M_1: 12-imam canonical ordering S_12 12 sequential dhikr phases
M_2: per-imam soft-prompt P_imam 12 frozen prompt-anchor identity vectors
M_3: 12-phase round-robin scheduler R_12 phase-locked rotation deterministic order
M_4: muršid-mürid lineage transfer M_lineage master-student weight-delta 12 P_imam directions
M_5: zarif consistency loss L_zarif phase-coherence regularizer direction drift student fine-tunes

results.justification: ROLLMUX covers M_3 round-robin and partial M_1; no per-imam soft-prompt, no lineage weight-delta, no zarif phase-coherence regularizer.
Post-training survey covers partial M_3; no 12-imam canonical, no per-imam frozen prompt, no lineage transfer, no zarif L.
Modern pipeline covers partial M_3; no 12-imam canonical ordering, no per-imam frozen prompt, no lineage weight-delta, no zarif L.
Multi-power-law schedule covers partial M_3; no canonical 12-imam ordering, no per-imam prompt, no lineage transfer, no zarif L.
Master-checkpoint + 3-stage covers partial M_3+M_4; no 12-imam canonical, no per-imam frozen prompt, no zarif L.
4-stage multi-cycle covers partial M_3; no 12-imam canonical, no per-imam frozen prompt, no lineage transfer, no zarif L.
Training data lineage covers partial M_4; no 12-imam canonical, no per-imam prompt, no 12-phase scheduler, no zarif phase-coherence regularizer.
LLMOrbit covers partial M_1 (circular taxonomy); no per-imam frozen prompt, no 12-phase round-robin, no lineage weight-delta, no zarif L.
